title: berlinia phenacoa
intro: Berlinia phenacoa, also known as Bush Mango, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Sapindaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. Berlinia phenacoa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of the aforementioned conditions.
